  "name": "relay",

    "dev": "electron-vite dev",
    "dev:logs": "electron-vite dev 2>&1 | tee /tmp/relay-dev.log",

    "logs:dev": "touch /tmp/relay-dev.log && tail -n 200 -f /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "preview": "electron-vite preview",

I found the route: renderer `App.tsx` calls preload, preload invokes `ticket:createDraft`, main maps it to `createTicketDraft`, and the literal 90 second timeout is in `src/main/services/codex.ts`. I’m reading those call sites and the existing test harness now so the fix matches local patterns.

); } function CreateTicketModal({ projectPath, onClose, onCreated, setToast }: { projectPath: string; onClose: () => void; onCreated: () => void; setToast: (toast: Toast) => void; }): ReactElement { const [idea, setIdea] = useState(""); const [draft, setDraft] = useState(null); const [manualTitle, setManualTitle] = useState(""); const [manualMarkdown, setManualMarkdown] = useState(""); const [priority, setPriority] = useState("medium"); const [labels, setLabels] = useState(""); const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false); const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false); const [draftMessage, setDraftMessage] = useState(null); const draftTicket = async (): Promise => { setBusy(true); setDraftMessage("Codex is drafting the ticket. If Codex is not authenticated or does not respond, this will time out after 90 seconds."); try { const nextDraft = await window.relay.ticket.createDraft({ projectPath, idea }); setDraft(nextDraft); setManualTitle(nextDraft.title); setManualMarkdown(markdownFromDraft(nextDraft)); setPriority(nextDraft.priority); setLabels(nextDraft.labels.join(", ")); setDraftMessage("Draft ready. Review and save it to the board."); } catch (error) { const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Ticket drafting failed."; setToast({ kind: "error", message }); setDraftMessage(message); const fallbackTitle = idea.split("\n")[0]?.trim() || "Untitled Ticket"; setManualTitle(fallbackTitle); setManualMarkdown(emptyTicketMarkdown(fallbackTitle)); } finally { setBusy(false); } }; const save = async (): Promise => { const title = manualTitle.trim() || idea.split("\n")[0]?.trim() || "Untitled Ticket"; setSaving(true); try { await window.relay.ticket.createManual(projectPath, { title, priority, labels: labels .split(",") .map((label) => label.trim()) .filter(Boolean), markdown: manualMarkdown.trim() || emptyTicketMarkdown(title) }); setToast({ kind: "success", message: "Ticket created." }); onCreated(); onClose(); } catch (error) { setToast({ kind: "error", message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unable to create ticket." }); } finally { setSaving(false); } }; return (
